title: Bridge Essay: The neural system of metacognition accompanying decision-making in the prefronta

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**The neural system of metacognition accompanying decision-making in the prefrontal cortex.**. PLoS Biol.. PMID: 29684004. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pbio.2004037. Decision-making is usually accompanied by metacognition, through which adecision maker monitors uncertainty regarding adecision and may then consequently revise the decision. These metacognitive processes can occur prior to or in the absence of feedback. However, the neural mechanisms of metacognition remain controversial.
